name: The Walking Dead
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance based on assistants owned.

name: Deadened Muscles
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Necropolises built this Reincarnation.
formula: (40 + 4 * x^0.8)%, where x = highest Necropolises this Reincarnation

name: Death Temples
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on highest Necropolises built this Reincarnation.
formula: +(6 + 1.5 * x^0.5), where x = highest Necropolises this Reincarnation

name: Undead Resilience
effect: Increase Night Time Duration based on Undead Coins found this Era.
formula: (5 + 1.5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%, where x = Undead FC found this Era

name: Corpse Supply
effect: Gain assistants based on time spent this Era.
formula: +(5 + 0.5 * x^0.7), where x = time this Era

name: Plagued Buildings
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on most used spell's activity time this Era. Offline time this Era is also added to Night Time activity time.
formula: (25 + 2.5 * x^0.75)%, where x = most used spell activity time this Era

name: Dead Fields
effect: Buildings and spell activity times count 75% more.

name: Tireless Workers
effect: Increase production of assistants based on Mana Regeneration.

name: Unholy Rituals
effect: Increase offline production based on time spent offline this Reincarnation. Also increase production of all buildings based on offline time this Era.
formula: Offline: (50 + 9.5 * x^0.95)%; All Buildings: (50 + 7.5 * x^0.75)%; x = offline time

name: Flesh Servants
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on highest Flesh Workshops built this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.7 * x^0.7)%, where x = highest Flesh Workshops this Reincarnation

name: Eternal Servitude
effect: Increase Unique building production based on time spent this Era.
formula: (0.7 * x^0.7)%, where x = time this Era

name: Zombie Apocalypse
effect: Increase Offline Production based on duration of your longest spell.
formula: (7 * x^0.7)%, where x = longest spell duration
